StyledText.Data: View page items in Title <<TF TT Header::Text>>

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Block and text (click to view page item)
Number of page items found: <<FAT Page item::Num of page items>>
View page items based on block

ScriptReference.name: Go page item ƒ Title block
Go page item ƒ Title block
View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled
